goal: make research notes target-aware and add TC4-like aspect relationship rules
implemented: ResearchAspectGraph calculates aspect graph distance from TC4 aspect component relationships.
ResearchNoteRequirements derives required aspects for target research categories.
ResearchNoteState initializes anchors based on target research instead of static AER/PRAECANTATIO only.
ResearchNoteState stores required aspect ids in note NBT.
ResearchNoteState.hasAllRequired validates required aspects are placed.
ResearchNoteState.canLink now uses aspect graph distance <= 2.
ResearchNoteSolver refuses solve if required aspects are missing.
ResearchTableBlock creates notes for the selected/first available research target.
ResearchNoteItem tooltip shows target and required aspect count.
ResearchNoteScreen marks required aspects and colors links by relation distance.
not_yet_final: Required aspects are heuristic by research key/category until exact TC4 research data mapping is imported.
Line rendering is still simplified rectangle lines, not exact original curved/glyph line rendering.
Exact TC4 research difficulty/complexity values are not imported yet.
Need full data-driven research pages and exact requirements per entry.
